title: mass production evas and magi
wikitext:
[]: mass production evas and magi             Quote Post by alicespin » Sun Oct 26, 2025 2:29 pm so we know (at least i hope im right) that the evangelions that Asuka, Rei, and Shinji pilot require their mothers soul, but what about the mass production evangelions? do they not require a soul? do they not even require a pilot? same question with the magi, the one that nerv uses is based off of ritsukos mother right? so what about the other magi (the one that the city uses, the one that all the other countries use in the end of evangelion)? are they using the same magi based off of ritsukos mother, or are they based off other people?

[]: Re: mass production evas and magi             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Oct 26, 2025 3:03 pm When they deploy, we see a cut where the dummy plug is injected into the MPEs, one having the text "KAWORU" written along its length. As for the Magi, those seem just the NGE equivalent of LLMs - "AI" - trained on Naoko rather than being ensouled, there being three of them to share a soul across. After all, we don't see anything from the Magi in either Instrumentality, TV or EoE.

[]: Re: mass production evas and magi             Quote Post by alicespin » Mon Oct 27, 2025 1:08 pm ah i didn't know that about the evas but my question was are ALL the magi trained on naoko or are they trained on different people for different purposes?

[]: Re: mass production evas and magi             Quote Post by Ringworm128 » Mon Dec 29, 2025 12:05 am The "mass production" in the name implies there would probably be some kind of shortcut in how they're made. So if you wanna get headcanonish maybe they were made with a sort of synthetic "one soul fits all" type. Or maybe they have random souls from whoever but the dummy plug based on Kaworu has some trace of Adam's soul and can sync up with them the same way Kaworu could with Unit 2? These are just random guesses on my part though.

[]: Re: mass production evas and magi             Quote Post by PEN2PEN » Mon Dec 29, 2025 1:27 pm I never really thought deeply about the souls of mass-produced Evas, and it's a good question. The only thing the movie shows us is the insertion of the capsules with Kaworu's name written on them. Everything seems to indicate that the capsule does all the work and that these Evas have no soul. Otherwise, we would have to admit that souls can be cloned in the Eva universe, which would be a great help to Gendo, and he wouldn't have to worry if Rei's soul slipped through his fingers at some point. By the way, no one in their right mind would send several Evas out with the capsule exposed. No matter how well they are secured, something could go wrong and the capsules could fall, which would mean: inoperative Evas. This scene only works for the viewer; it is a message from the author to tell us that these Evas have a relationship with Kaworu that could not otherwise have been shown. Before the capsule is fully inserted, you can see the units moving their heads out of that lower hole in the plane. And this is where you ask yourself: how could it move on its own if the capsule wasn't inserted? Or was it the plane that was pushing its head out?

[]: Re: mass production evas and magi             Quote Post by Darth Plato » Mon Dec 29, 2025 6:32 pm Speaking of moms, what happens if you get in the wrong eva? It's been known to happen...

Everything seems to indicate that the capsule does all the work and that these Evas have no soul. This scene only works for the viewer; it is a message from the author to tell us that these Evas have a relationship with Kaworu that could not otherwise have been shown.
